items.summary: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of  the historic Hurricane Melissa.

items.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

items.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

items.summary: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.

items.summary: Introducing SIMA 2, a Gemini-powered AI agent that can think, understand, and take actions in interactive environments.

items.title: Teaching AI to see the world more like we do
items.summary: Our new paper analyzes the important ways AI systems organize the visual world differently from humans.

items.title: How AI is giving Northern Ireland teachers time back
items.summary: A six-month long pilot program with the Northern Ireland Education Authority’s C2k initiative found that integrating Gemini and other generative AI tools saved participating teachers an average of 10 hours per week.

items.title: Introducing Gemma 3n: The developer guide
items.summary: Gemma 3n is designed for the developer community that helped shape Gemma.

items.title: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite is now ready for scaled production use
items.summary: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, previously in preview, is now stable and generally available. This cost-efficient model provides high quality in a small size, and includes 2.5 family features like a 1 million-token context window and multimodality.

items.title: Behind “ANCESTRA”: combining Veo with live-action filmmaking
items.summary: We partnered with Darren Aronofsky, Eliza McNitt and a team of more than 200 people to make a film using Veo and live-action filmmaking.

items.title: AlphaEarth Foundations helps map our planet in unprecedented detail
items.summary: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

items.title: Exploring the context of online images with Backstory
items.summary: New experimental AI tool helps people explore the context and origin of images seen online.

items.title: Advanced version of Gemini with Deep Think officially achieves gold-medal standard at the International Mathematical Olympiad
items.summary: The International Mathematical Olympiad (“IMO”) is the world’s most prestigious competition for young mathematicians, and has been held annually since 1959. Each country taking part is represented by six elite, pre-university mathematicians who compete to solve six exceptionally difficult problems in algebra, combinatorics, geometry, and number theory.

items.title: Aeneas transforms how historians connect the past
items.summary: Introducing the first model for contextualizing ancient inscriptions, designed to help historians better interpret, attribute and restore fragmentary texts.

items.title: Genie 3: A new frontier for world models
items.summary: Genie 3 can generate dynamic worlds that you can navigate in real time at 24 frames per second, retaining consistency for a few minutes at a resolution of 720p.

items.title: How AI is helping advance the science of bioacoustics to save endangered species
items.summary: Our new Perch model helps conservationists analyze audio faster to protect endangered species, from Hawaiian honeycreepers to coral reefs.

items.title: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth
items.summary: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth

items.title: Gemini achieves gold-medal level at the International Collegiate Programming Contest World Finals
items.summary: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think achieves breakthrough performance at the world’s most prestigious computer programming competition, demonstrating a profound leap in abstract problem solving.

items.title: Discovering new solutions to century-old problems in fluid dynamics
items.summary: Our new method could help mathematicians leverage AI techniques to tackle long-standing challenges in mathematics, physics and engineering.

items.title: Strengthening our Frontier Safety Framework
items.summary: We’re strengthening the Frontier Safety Framework (FSF) to help identify and mitigate severe risks from advanced AI models.

items.title: Gemini Robotics 1.5 brings AI agents into the physical world
items.summary: We’re powering an era of physical agents — enabling robots to perceive, plan, think, use tools and act to better solve complex, multi-step tasks.

items.title: Introducing CodeMender: an AI agent for code security
items.summary: Using advanced AI to fix critical software vulnerabilities

items.title: Bringing AI to the next generation of fusion energy
items.summary: We’re partnering with Commonwealth Fusion Systems (CFS) to bring clean, safe, limitless fusion energy closer to reality.

items.title: Try Deep Think in the Gemini app
items.summary: We're rolling out Deep Think in the Gemini app for Google AI Ultra subscribers, and we're giving select mathematicians access to the full version of the Gemini 2.5 Deep Think model entered into the IMO competition.

items.title: Rethinking how we measure AI intelligence
items.summary: Game Arena is a new, open-source platform for rigorous evaluation of AI models. It allows for head-to-head comparison of frontier systems in environments with clear winning conditions.

items.title: Introducing Gemma 3 270M: The compact model for hyper-efficient AI
items.summary: Today, we're adding a new, highly specialized tool to the Gemma 3 toolkit: Gemma 3 270M, a compact, 270-million parameter model.

items.title: Image editing in Gemini just got a major upgrade
items.summary: Transform images in amazing new ways with updated native image editing in the Gemini app.

items.title: VaultGemma: The world's most capable differentially private LLM
items.summary: We introduce VaultGemma, the most capable model trained from scratch with differential privacy.
